title: Building an AI Sales Concierge for Luxury Watch Buying & Selling
description: Designed a domain-aware conversational AI concierge that helps buyers navigate luxury watch inventory and assists sellers in crafting stronger listings — combining retrieval, reasoning, and guided dialogue.

title: Government Directive Intelligence & Policy Tracking System
description: Built an AI-powered intelligence platform enabling leadership teams to search, analyze, and synthesize progress across government directives, ministry responses, and initiative-level execution data using hybrid RAG.

title: AI Agent for RPA Code Generation
description: Built an AI agent that translates natural language business requirements into production-ready RPA automation scripts — decomposing intent into SDK-aligned automation steps with validation and refinement.

title: Enterprise RAG Platform for Knowledge Search & Support
description: Engineered end-to-end retrieval-augmented generation systems for enterprise knowledge retrieval — combining hybrid search, semantic chunking, and grounded LLM generation to deliver trustworthy AI-assisted answers.

title: Document Intelligence & OCR Pipeline for Complex Records
description: Designed a layered document intelligence pipeline that extracts structured data from scanned, multilingual, and layout-heavy documents — moving beyond raw OCR into full document understanding and field extraction.

title: Vision-Based Desktop UI Automation System
description: Developed a perception-driven desktop automation system that targets UI elements using visual understanding and OCR rather than selectors — enabling automation in environments where traditional RPA methods break down.

title: LLM Infrastructure, Inference APIs & Evaluation Pipelines
description: Built the production infrastructure layer for multiple AI systems — covering model serving APIs, embedding services, containerized GPU deployments, and evaluation loops that move AI from prototype to production-ready.

title: Multi-Agent AI Research & Applied Workflow Systems
description: Designed and built multi-agent AI orchestration systems with specialized roles — planner, retriever, executor, critic — enabling structured reasoning, tool use, and iterative refinement for complex enterprise workflows.
